name: Behavior Observer
description: Learns repeated action sequences from OpenClaw-observable events and proposes approval-gated automation drafts.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Turn behavior observation and background analysis on or off.

analyzerIntervalSec.label: Analyzer Interval
analyzerIntervalSec.help: How often the analyzer service runs, in seconds.

episodeGapMinutes.label: Episode Gap
episodeGapMinutes.help: Split action streams into new episodes when the gap exceeds this many minutes.

minSupport.label: Min Support
minSupport.help: Minimum number of episodes required before a pattern is considered strong.

minConfidence.label: Min Confidence
minConfidence.help: Minimum prefix confidence required before creating a proposal.

maxPatternLength.label: Max Pattern Length
maxPatternLength.help: Maximum ordered sequence length to mine.

retentionDaysRaw.label: Raw Event Retention
retentionDaysRaw.help: How many days minimized raw hook events are kept.

retentionDaysActions.label: Action Retention
retentionDaysActions.help: How many days normalized actions are kept for pattern mining.
